chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 750 of 2021. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[s] 30.03.2022 FOR ORDERS AS TO NON-PROSECUTION. Mr. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, A.A.G. Sindh. ------ In this petition the petitioner claims compensatory benefits / emoluments on account of sad demise of the husband of the petitioner i.e. Khadim Hussain. In terms of para-2, the husband expired in the year 1983 and since then petitioner claimed to have been deprived. This petition is seriously suffers from laches and no legitimate excuse has been provided by the petitioner for this inordinate delay. This is a discretionary relief, the petition is dismissed and taking a lenient view with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE A.
